headline: Qualcomm Targets Robotics And AI Native 6G To Broaden Growth Story
summary: Qualcomm announced a push into robotics with its new Dragonwing processor, built specifically for robotics platforms. The company also revealed a coalition with Amazon, Google, and Microsoft to develop AI native 6G, aiming for device demonstrations by 2028 and global rollout from 2029. These moves are intended to broaden Qualcomm’s business beyond smartphones into next generation connectivity and AI infrastructure. QUALCOMM (NasdaqGS:QCOM) is making this shift while its share price trades...

headline: XRP Could Hit $1,000 Under Full Institutional Adoption Scenario, Commentators Claim
summary: XRP may have the potential to reach four-digit price levels under a full institutional adoption framework, according to commentary from the latest Paul Barron podcast featuring Jake Claver. XRP's Regulatory Position The discussion emphasized that Ripple strengthened XRP's legal standing...

headline: MWC 2026 | Fibocom Leads the Industry with Power Class 1 (PC1) Module Innovation, Empowering High-Power FWA Applications
summary: At MWC 2026, Fibocom announced the industry's first implementation of Power Class 1 (PC1) modules based on both the MediaTek T930 and Qualcomm X85/X82 platforms, marking a major milestone in high-power 5G module technology.
